Visit <a href=\"https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/requirements\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/requirements</a> for more specific UC Merced admissions information.</p><p><br></p><p>Prior to Transferring to UC Merced, please be advised of the following for Junior Transfers:</p><p><br></p><p><strong>1) WRI 001 and WRI 010 are admissions requirements:</strong> WRI 001 is fulfilled by IGETC/Cal-GETC 1A - English Composition. WRI 010 is fulfilled by IGETC/Cal-GETC 1B - Critical Thinking/English Composition. Please scroll towards the bottom of the agreement to find the articulation for each course.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>2) Transfer Admissions Guarantee (TAG):</strong> UC Merced is one of the six UC's that offers Transfer Admissions Guarantee. Please visit the TAG website for more information: <a href=\"https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/tag\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/tag</a></p><p><br></p><p><strong>3) General Education (GE Requirements):</strong> While general education is not required for admission, it can help speed up your time to graduation once you transfer to UC Merced. We highly recommend reviewing the <a href=\"https://catalog.ucmerced.edu/content.php?catoid=22&navoid=2163#transfer\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">Transfer Students: Satisfying General Education</a> page in the catalog for a more extensive explanation of the requirements.</p><p><br></p><p>IGETC/Cal-GETC is acceptable for students planning to transfer into the School of Natural Sciences. Students are encouraged to prioritize as much lower-division major preparation as possible before transferring to ensure a smooth transition and timely progress toward their degree.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>4. This agreement displays all lower-division (or Major Preparation) courses required in the major.</strong> UC Merced courses on the left, approved (articulated) transfer courses to the right.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>5. Changes to this Agreements:</strong> Major requirements are subject to change from one academic year to the next. Newly-articulated courses are added on a rolling basis, and articulated courses can be revised. Visit ASSIST every semester for the latest information and consult with an Academic Counselor at your institution on a regular basis.</p><p><br></p><p>For more questions about admissions, please email: <a href=\"mailto:transfer@ucmerced.edu\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">transfer@ucmerced.edu</a>.</p>","groupId":"fae16f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":3,"area":"General"},{"type":"RequirementTitle","content":"ADDITIONAL LOWER DIVISION COURSES","groupId":"a4047945-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":4,"area":"Requirements"},{"type":"GeneralTitle","content":"ADMISSIONS MAJOR SELECTION CRITERIA","groupId":"fbe16f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":0,"area":"General"},{"type":"RequirementTitle","content":"ADDITIONAL MAJOR PREPARATION COURSES","groupId":"2e0b7945-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":2,"area":"Requirements"},{"type":"RequirementTitle","content":"ENGLISH COMPOSITION","groupId":"1bbb7645-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":8,"area":"Requirements"}]
